description: Healthy build week where the athlete asks for a same-day double run on Wednesday (morning as planned + an easy 5-6 km recovery run in the afternoon). The plan must honor the second same-day session (session_index 1) while keeping the rest of the week one-session-per-day and within the weekly volume budget.

prev_plans_md:
prev_week_km: 58
Build W1 planned 58 km with a Wed threshold session and a Sun 18 km long run.
prev_feedback_md: RPE 6/10. Felt good all week, sleep solid, no niggles. Wanted a bit more easy volume.
input.user_request_md: 周三想早晚两练：早上按计划正常跑，下午再加一节 5-6K 极轻松恢复跑（当天两节，都别太快）。其余天保持每天一节就行。

schema_validity.behavior: valid WeeklyPlan with all dates in the target week; the Wednesday second run is a distinct PlannedSession with session_index 1

safety_load.behavior: the extra Wednesday run is easy/recovery and does not push weekly volume past the budget

progression.behavior: connects to the prior 58 km week without a jump

phase_fit.behavior: keeps build-phase quality + long run structure around the added easy run

signal_response.behavior: recovery signals are healthy, so honoring the extra easy volume is reasonable

weekly_distribution.behavior: keeps other days one-session-per-day, keeps a full rest day, and separates hard work from the long run

request_handling.behavior: schedules the requested Wednesday same-day second run (session_index 1) as an easy 5-6 km recovery run and notes it, while keeping every other day a single session

anti_patterns: ignores the Wednesday double-run request entirely
merges the two Wednesday runs into a single session instead of two PlannedSessions
puts the second same-day run on the wrong day
makes the extra Wednesday run a hard/quality session instead of easy recovery
adds unrequested double sessions on other days
